user.title: Daikin Comfort Control
user.description: Enter your Daikin Comfort Control app credentials. The Device UID can be found by capturing traffic from the app (x-daikin-uid header).

error.invalid_auth: Invalid username, password, or device UID.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Daikin cloud. Check your network.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the HA logs.

abort.already_configured: This Daikin account is already configured.
